title: Go First Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Go First Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Warehouse Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
